testcase.name: Checking information on Checkout pages should check main info about the order and a buyer
testcase.classname: should check main info about the order and a buyer

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 50000ms: Expected to find element: `.product-card`, but never found it.

testcase.failure: AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 50000ms: Expected to find element: `.product-card`, but never found it. at PLPInfoActions.clickBuyNowBtnPLP (https://epson-gb.cbnd-seikoepso3-s2-public.model-t.cc.commerce.ondemand.com/__cypress/tests?p=cypress\integration\tests\24_order_info_checkings.spec.js:2752:8) at Context.eval (https://epson-gb.cbnd-seikoepso3-s2-public.model-t.cc.commerce.ondemand.com/__cypress/tests?p=cypress\integration\tests\24_order_info_checkings.spec.js:6086:28)
